rationale: BANDIT-030 is safe to land as a bounded Phase 7 improvement evaluation work item because it evaluates the now-due BANDIT-023 non-blocking review-finding routing hypothesis from repo-native evidence, records result effective and decision keep, and preserves fail-closed behavior for CodeRabbit request-changes, stale review-subject hash, missing PM disposition, and blocker Local Qwen outcomes.
